title.en: Fortunately, nothing like this happened, and he...

content.en:
In the realm of the source of the realm, Ye Tian was really worried that a certain True Monarch would kill him regardless of his identity, then he would be finished.

Fortunately, nothing like this happened, and he arrived safely in his territory.

In the Void Heaven True Country, even other True Monarchs would not dare to attack him rashly, and the news that he had obtained the Innate Origin Life should not be known to anyone, so he was very safe.

As soon as he came back, Ye Tian began to sort out his harvest.

The many treasures obtained from other True Monarchs are not of other value, if only the innate origin things are counted, Ye Tian sorted it out a little, but found that there were too many innate origin things on his body.

There are about 260,000 high-grade innate origin things in total.

There are about 3,710 top-level innate origin things.

Innate Origin Life, a total of six.

That's all the Innate Origin!

"There is almost no shortage of cultivation resources at the True Monarch level!" Ye Tian thought.

And not only is he not lacking, he can even train others.

In the following days, Ye Tian did not go out to wave, but chose to retreat.

Even some True Monarchs of the Void Heaven Temple invited him to participate in some meetings, but he refused.

Ye Tian knew very well that he was too weak now, even if his status was noble, but others might not respect you, and there were definitely not a few people in the Void Heaven vein who were hostile to him.

After all, some people's thoughts are jealousy, thinking that how can a native He De become a personal disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor?

They would not approve of Ye Tian's demons and talents, even if others said it, they didn't believe it, and their minds were full of jealousy and resentment.

In the case of not having the strength, he participates in too many things, and he may be betrayed by his own people who are in the void of heaven one day.

Therefore, Ye Tian didn't care about many things in the outside world, and devoted himself to retreat and cultivate.

In the following days, Ye Tian spent a lot of resources and high-level innate origin things, constantly cultivating the third layer of the Xuanxuan Jue True Spirit Chapter, with the assistance of many high-level resources, in just 3 million years, Ye Tian successfully practiced the third layer of the Xuanxu Jue True Spirit Chapter, and his strength skyrocketed.

At the same time, the prototype of Ye Tian's Avenue is also constantly improving, gradually approaching the 100,000-meter perfection level.

During this period of time, not only Ye Tian was cultivating in retreat, but many True Monarchs were also cultivating in retreat, and the True Monarchs of the entire Quasi-Dao Realm seemed to be much less at once.

It can be said that the True Monarchs who have made great gains in the realm of the Realm Source are basically using this time to improve their strength.

Soon after, a piece of news came.

The Falling Sea True Monarch of the Chaos Trading House used his innate origin life to break the shackles, and his own Great Dao cultivation reached the level of 100,000 meters of perfection, and he stepped into the half-step True Ancestor realm in one fell swoop.

The difference between 99,999 meters and 100,000 meters seems to be only one meter, but the difference between them is like a world of difference.

The difference of one meter is enough to increase the strength of Luohai Zhenjun by no less than ten times.

The half-step True Ancestor is almost a True Ancestor seed, and it will inevitably be able to become a True Ancestor in the future, and it only takes a lot of time to complete the fusion of the Great Dao and the Divine Soul, and once the fusion is successful, it will be the True Ancestor.

This step is similar to a half-step True Spirit, except that the half-step True Ancestor level takes longer and consumes more resources.

But the Chaos Merchant has no shortage of resources, and the True Monarch of the Falling Sea has harvested a lot of innate origin things, so naturally it will not be for the sake of resources.

As long as the true monarch of Luohai is given time, he will definitely be able to become a true ancestor.

What shocked many people was that not only Luohai Zhenjun stepped into the half-step True Ancestor level next, but also several True Monarchs also stepped into the half-step True Ancestor level, and one of them was still a non-True Monarch True Monarch.

Obviously, the people who have obtained the innate origin life are not only Luohai Zhenjun, but many people, but the news that those people have obtained the innate origin life has not spread.

However, even if those non-True Monarch List True Monarchs become half-step True Ancestors, their strength is not necessarily stronger than that of True Monarch List True Monarchs.

The True Monarch List True Monarch basically has a record of killing or drawing the True Ancestor, not to mention the average True Monarch who has been promoted to the half-step True Ancestor level, even if he becomes a True Ancestor, he cannot match the powerful True Monarch List True Monarch.

Terran territory.

Ye Tian also got the news about the promotion of many people to a half-step True Ancestor, and couldn't help muttering: "It seems that I am not the only one who has good luck, but it is also true, there are definitely more than a few innate origin beings in the realm of the Boundary Origin, and it is not strange that other people can get the innate origin life at all!"

He didn't pay much attention to this matter, but continued to practice in retreat.

In the blink of an eye, that's 60 million years.

For such a long time, Ye Tian had spent tens of thousands of high-level innate origin things, and finally practiced the Xuanxuan Jue True Spirit Chapter to the sixth layer, and the strength of the whole person skyrocketed many times.

Now he can easily suppress his original self, and it is not even a problem to kill his original self.

The True Spirit Chapter of the Xuan Xuan Jue reached the sixth layer, and Ye Tian's cultivation was naturally raised to the peak level of the middle stage of the True Spirit Realm, and the divine soul and divine power were far from being comparable to the original.

In addition, the prototype of Yetian's avenue has also become longer, more than 95,000 meters.

The closer it is to the length of 100,000 meters, the more difficult it is for the prototype of the Great Dao to grow, and the more difficult it is to grow in addition to the fact that the prototype of Ye Tian's Great Dao far exceeds that of other people's Great Dao Prototype.

What surprised Ye Tian the most was that his Blood River True Body, the Origin Divine Ability, had reached the Dacheng realm.

The Origin Divine Power is created by oneself, so it is not difficult to improve, but because the grade of the Origin Divine Power is too high, it is also very difficult to ascend to the Dacheng realm.

Ye Tian's comprehension is too high, and he has a super god-level super comprehension talent, so he can cultivate it to the Dacheng realm in such a short time.

The Blood River True Body of the Dacheng Realm not only increased Ye Tian's life-saving ability many times, but also made the physical power he exerted much stronger, and his strength was naturally stronger.

According to Ye Tian's estimation, with his current defense and recovery ability, even if he stood and let the original Traceless True Monarch attack, he would not want to kill him.

In terms of strength, he has surpassed the Traceless True Monarch.

Moreover, as his Xuan Xuan Jue True Spirit Chapter reached the sixth layer, his combat power should have reached the True Monarch Rank True Monarch level.

As for whether it was or not, it was soon known, and there was no need for him to verify it.

Soon after.

The Yang Dragon True Monarch was summoned, and some of the True Monarchs of the Void Heaven Hall also came one after another.

Ye Tian was the first to connect to Yanglong Zhenjun's summons-

"Master, you have ascended to the 988th place on the True Monarch List!"

Yanglong Zhenjun's voice was filled with endless shock and joy, after all, the stronger Ye Tian was, the more he would benefit as a servant.

The other summons of the True Monarch of the Void Heaven Hall were also about his promotion to the True Monarch List, all of which were to congratulate him on becoming the True Monarch of the True Monarch List.

But Ye Tian knew very well that he had become a true monarch, and I am afraid that he had already caused an uproar in the quasi-Dao world.
